title: Odal Node — Construction Products Sector Data (v1.1.0)
description: Construction products fields per EU CPR 2024/3110. Mandate is phased by product family (~2028-2032). This schema is provisional pending final delegated acts. v1.1.0 renames countryOfManufacture to countryOfOrigin for cross-sector naming consistency.

co2ePerFunctionalUnitKg.description: Carbon footprint in kg CO2e per functional unit.

functionalUnit.description: Description of the functional unit, e.g. 'per tonne', 'per m2', 'per m3'.

recycledContentPct.description: Recycled content as a percentage of total input material.

epdUrl.description: URL to the Environmental Product Declaration (EPD).

ceMarking.description: Whether the product carries CE marking under EU CPR.
